resources.string: SeeNot uses accessibility services to monitor app usage and enforce your declared intentions.
Detects controlled apps and reads the current screen for intent checks.
SeeNot cannot check or remind you in time.
Shows the intent prompt, session status, and reminders.
Prompts and reminders may not appear.
All permissions enabled, ready to use
While paused, SeeNot will stop monitoring this app and restore it automatically when time is up.
Enter how many hours to pause. SeeNot will resume automatically when time is up.
While paused, SeeNot will stop judging all controlled apps and restore automatically when time is up.
Remove %s from controlled apps? SeeNot will stop monitoring it, but your saved intents and records will remain.
Example: Only check work messages, 10 minutes
Keeps SeeNot accessibility service running in background

“Deny” can also express “only allow …”. Write what should trigger intervention: for example, “only check delivery status in a food delivery app” becomes “all other content except checking delivery status”.
Runtime event logging not enabled. Set SEENOT_DEVELOPMENT_MODE=true in local.properties first.
You are deviating from what you intended to do
You seem to be drifting from your goal
Will generate a supplementary rule draft and determine if it should apply to the entire app or just this intent
No usable supplementary rule draft was generated this time. Please try again.
Generated a less ideal draft. You can edit it directly or try again.
Supplementary rule generated. You can edit and save.
Similar rule exists. Judgment resumed and effective immediately.
Rule saved. Judgment resumed and effective immediately.
Rule generated. Judgment resumed and effective immediately.
Daily cumulative limits are not supported yet. Rephrase it as \"this session up to X minutes\" or \"that content up to X minutes\".
Mic permission not granted. You can type instead.
Press Enter to apply this rule
Tap mic to record, or type directly
No voice input configured. You can type directly.
Intent recognized. Please confirm manually, or speak again if incorrect.
If you stay in this app, SeeNot will remind you again.
No analysis or intervention this session
This judgment was not quite right?
We will record this content judgment correction for future optimization
We will record this timing judgment correction for future optimization
You can edit the result after generation, or rewrite it yourself
Mic permission required for voice input. Please enable it in Settings.
Failed to start recording. Please try again.
No network right now. SeeNot cannot run AI checks until you are back online.
The network is currently unreachable. SeeNot cannot run AI checks right now.
Model authentication failed. Please check API Key.
Offline now, resumes when back online
Not a SeeNot configuration export file
This archive contains SeeNot rule evaluation record export.
- records.json: All rule evaluation records in JSON format
- metadata.json: Summary statistics and export info
- images/: Screenshots taken during rule evaluation (PNG format)
- isConditionMatched: Condition match result, meaning depends on constraint type
- TIME_CAP: true = in_scope (timing) / false = out_of_scope (not timing)
- mediaContext: Current foreground app media playback context (optional), including status, title, artist, playbackState, durationMs, and related fields
Note: Screenshots are stored in app internal storage, not in system gallery.
No records today. The system will show violations and timing events here when you open controlled apps.
You chose to return to task
You chose to end current content
No records yet. "Save judgment records" may not be enabled.
System will generate a supplementary rule based on the screenshot, current intent and app characteristics, and determine if it should apply to the entire app or just this intent.
Optional: e.g., This is only a recommendation card, not the actual target page
You can edit the generated result, or write a more accurate supplementary rule yourself
No media info for current app
Are you sure you want to delete this record? This cannot be undone.
Export %d selected records as ZIP file, screenshots can be included.
Export %d filtered records as ZIP file, screenshots can be included.
Export %d selected records as ZIP file, screenshots can be included.
Export %d filtered records as ZIP file, screenshots can be included.
Shows Android\'s required running notification so SeeNot can keep detecting controlled apps.
Without it, Android is more likely to stop SeeNot, so controlled app detection may not continue.
Reduces the chance that Android stops SeeNot.
Long background sessions may stop checking or reminding.
Turn this on if you want to speak your goal. You can still type without it.
Gives SeeNot another way to confirm the foreground app. SeeNot still works without it.
Lets SeeNot use Notification Access to read player titles and playback status for video checks. SeeNot still works without it.
Core analysis is ready. Tap to modify provider, model or API Key
Core analysis is not configured yet. Tap to finish AI setup
You can use your own API key without signing in. With Plus, SeeNot AI works without model or key setup.
Your API key is ready for core AI features. Plus removes the ongoing model and key setup.
Your API key is ready for core AI features, and voice input is ready too. Plus removes the ongoing model and key setup.
Plus includes visual checks, intent parsing, and voice input without an API key.
Your Plus plan can enable SeeNot AI directly, or you can keep using your own API key.
SeeNot AI temporary quota is used up. Please try again later.
Voice input is not configured yet. You can still type your intent
Open a controlled app, say today\'s goal, and try a reminder.
New users can get Plus to use SeeNot AI, or use their own API key.
Pick one app where you often drift.
These are not required to start. Turning them on gives SeeNot more signals in some situations.
No controlled apps yet. Tap to add at least one
%1$d controlled apps added. Tap to review or add more
Everything is ready. You can start using SeeNot now
One last step: add at least one controlled app
Please complete required permissions, AI setup, and add at least one controlled app
Open a controlled app and follow these steps.
Select apps to manage on the \"Apps\" page
Declare your intent when opening a controlled app, such as “I want to watch product design videos for 10 minutes.”
AI will guard your intent in real-time and remind or intervene when appropriate
If the system misunderstood, you can report a misreport anytime to let AI correct it.
Tap \"Add App\" to select apps to manage
You can choose to make this rule apply to the entire app, or only to a specific intent.
e.g., Do not identify as recommendation list just because product cards are shown on detail page
Add a preset intent before using this mode.
No preset intents yet. Tap add to create.
Supplementary rules are divided into two types: one applies to the entire app, one only refines a specific intent.
No bindable intents yet. Please keep at least one intent record.
e.g., Short videos, Moments, Video accounts
💡 You can enter multiple conditions, e.g.: Moments and Video accounts
Reminder only: Shows a prompt but does not block. User can continue.
Remind + Return: Shows a prompt and auto returns to previous screen. Suitable for interrupting without forcing a ban.
Force return: Returns directly to the system home screen, forcefully interrupting current behavior. Suitable for strong suppression.
You seem to be drifting from your goal
Are you sure you want to delete all judgment records? This cannot be undone.
Model, voice input and provider settings
You can use the AI setup on this device right away. If you want less setup to manage yourself, Plus is also available.
This device is currently using its own AI setup. You can switch to Plus later if you want less setup to manage.
Your Plus plan is ready. You can turn on SeeNot AI directly or keep using your own API key.
Visual checks, intent parsing, and voice input are currently provided by SeeNot AI.
Checking which account and AI options are available now.
No account is signed in yet.
Could not update account status right now. You can keep using local settings.
This account can sync basic state; SeeNot AI requires Plus.
This account can sync basic state; %1$d / %2$d devices are linked. SeeNot AI requires Plus.
Could not open web sign-in right now. Please try again.
Web sign-in did not finish. Return to the app and try again.
The sign-in callback was incomplete. Start sign-in again.
Could not refresh the account right now. Please try again.
Could not connect this device right now. Please try again.
Could not finish sign-in right now. Return to the app and try again.
This account has reached its device limit. Open your account page on the web, disconnect an older device, and then try again.
No API key setup needed; SeeNot AI stays ready when needed.
Get Plus to use SeeNot AI, or use the AI setup on this device.
Plus and local AI setup are both available. Choose which one to use by default here.
SeeNot Plus unlocks ready-to-use SeeNot AI, no setup needed.
Configure provider, model, Base URL, and voice model for your own API key.
Affects home display, startup behavior, and reminders
When off, home screen will not show today\'s timeline
Hide text when status bar is collapsed
When on, the collapsed status HUD keeps only the color indicator to reduce obstruction
Resume monitoring after device restart. Requires Accessibility to remain enabled.
Remind when no intent is set
If you stay in a controlled app without setting intent, remind again later
If this session is set to no monitoring, show one reminder after 20 minutes, then again every 20 minutes
Choose from 30 seconds to 10 minutes; turn it off to disable this reminder
Allow ignore once in non-gentle modes
When enabled, Moderate and Strict dialogs will also show “Ignore this time” without forcing correction or exit
Fix one intervention level for all rules
When enabled, both parsed and manually created rules will use the same level
Preset intents and newly parsed rules will all use this level
You have been here for a while
This session is in no-monitor mode and has been running for 20 minutes. If you continue, check whether this is still how you want to use it.
Decide whether to save judgment history and whether to remind immediately
Save each judgment result for later review
Stored in app storage only, not in system gallery
Pop up immediately after judgment; when off, these notifications will not appear
Import or export configuration, and share logs or runtime events
Helps you keep attention boundaries on your phone.
Checks whether a newer version is available.
See whether this is the latest version.
Could not check for updates right now. Please try again.
This version includes new improvements. Updating is recommended.
Source code, releases, and issue tracking
For first use, you only need to finish the core analysis setup. Voice input can be added later.
Voice input is optional. If you skip it for now, you can still type your intent directly.
Saved. Core analysis is now ready.
Saved. Core analysis is now ready, and voice input can be configured later.
Development mode active. DashScope API Key temporarily provided, valid until %s. Will auto deactivate after expiry. You can still manually enter your own key here.
Used when generating supplementary rules after misreports
Bias correction model is not used frequently. It only participates in analysis when you report a misreport to generate supplementary rules.
Voice input is auto configured. No need to fill in voice model.
Which AI option should I use?
If you just want to start quickly, get SeeNot Plus to use SeeNot AI. If you already know your AI service setup, you can keep using your own configuration.
Easiest start: get Plus and use SeeNot AI. SeeNot prepares the setup needed for analysis and voice input, so you do not need to maintain keys, models, or quota yourself.
Already have an AI account: connect it yourself. This is best if you are comfortable handling service billing, quota, network, and availability issues.
What if a judgment is wrong?
SeeNot may sometimes misjudge a screen. You can correct it when the status prompt appears, or review it later from judgment records.
Right away: expand the status prompt and tap “Wrong judgment”. This works for false reminders and for cases that were not stopped or counted correctly.
Later review: open judgment records, find that judgment, and mark it as inaccurate.
After correction: SeeNot uses your feedback to generate a supplementary rule, so similar situations better match your intent next time.

Next, the system Accessibility settings will open. Find SeeNot there and turn it on. After that, come back to the app so SeeNot can prompt for your intent and remind you when you enter controlled apps.
Next, the system overlay settings will open. Allow SeeNot to display over other apps so you can see the intent prompt and session status when entering controlled apps.
Next, the system battery settings will open. Set SeeNot to unrestricted or ignore optimization, so the system is less likely to kill it and interrupt reminders or analysis.

Next, Android Usage Access settings will open. Allow SeeNot to read recently used apps so it can still detect when you enter a controlled app if Android misses an accessibility app-switch event. SeeNot uses this only for app-level foreground state, not chat content or page text.
Before enabling Notification Access for video checks

Next, Android Notification Access settings will open. Allowing it lets SeeNot read the current media title, creator, and playback state from supported apps for more accurate video checks. SeeNot does not need SMS, chat messages, or other notification content. Recommended, but not required.
Some phones restrict apps installed from downloads from enabling overlay or Accessibility. Open SeeNot\'s app info, allow restricted settings, then come back and enable the permission again.
Tap the top-right menu and choose Allow restricted settings.
Go back to the permission settings page and enable the permission again.
If Android shows this denied access dialog, allow restricted settings first.
The Accessibility or overlay switch may be disabled.
Use the app info menu to allow restricted settings.
Some phones add extra background limits beyond the normal battery setting. If SeeNot stops checking or reminding after a while, check these settings.
First, make sure SeeNot\'s battery setting is unrestricted or ignoring optimization.
Then check app info for autostart, background running, or background activity, and allow SeeNot there.
Finally, open Recent apps and lock SeeNot from its card menu to reduce system or manual cleanup.
Start by setting the basic battery policy to unrestricted.
Some phones also show autostart or background running controls in app info.
The Recent apps lock can reduce cleanup of SeeNot.
Export current monitored apps, preset intents, default intent, recent intent history and AI supplementary notes.
Share all logs, or share logs by date range.
Export structured runtime events JSONL, filterable by time range.
Share failed, please check date format and logs
